field_notes.material_or_component: Material, module, membrane, device component, or method.
field_notes.claim: One concise claim supported by the source.
field_notes.assay_or_context: Experimental, review, bioprocess, neural culture, organ-on-chip, or vendor-spec context.
field_notes.readouts: Measured or proposed readouts relevant to LIMINA.
field_notes.result_summary: Short paraphrase of the relevant result.
field_notes.risk_or_caveat: Known limitation, uncertainty, or transfer-risk to CL1-like neural wetware.
field_notes.evidence_type: review, experimental, technical_note, vendor_spec, patent, inference.
